items.desc_zh: 有些人看到了双重标准：日本男人在公共场所打扫卫生，而他们的妻子则承担所有家务。

items.title_en: In Trump's shadow, Vance becomes face of Iran deal
items.title_zh: 在特朗普的阴影下，万斯成为伊朗协议的代言人
items.desc_en: His fierce defence of the Iran plan amid mounting criticism comes as speculation intensifies about a possible 2028 presidential run.
items.desc_zh: 在越来越多的批评之际，他对伊朗计划进行了激烈的辩护，与此同时，人们对 2028 年可能竞选总统的猜测也在加剧。

items.title_en: Medication abortion restored in Missouri following court ruling - The Hill

items.desc_en: Medication abortion restored in Missouri following court ruling  The HillRuling in Missouri Restores Access to Medication Abortions  The New York TimesMissouri judge strikes down nearly all state abor
items.desc_zh: 法院裁决后，密苏里州恢复药物堕胎 密苏里州希尔裁决恢复药物堕胎 《纽约时报》密苏里州法官否决了几乎所有州堕胎

items.title_en: UK actress charged with importing meth worth almost A$300m into Australia
items.title_zh: 英国女演员被控向澳大利亚进口价值近3亿澳元的冰毒
items.desc_en: Emaa Hussen, 34, faces life in prison for allegedly trying to smuggle 320kg of meth hidden in bags of charcoal.
items.desc_zh: 34 岁的艾玛·胡森 (Emaa Hussen) 因涉嫌试图走私藏在木炭袋中的 320 公斤冰毒而面临终身监禁。

items.title_en: Mangione's lawyers reverse course on psychiatric defence in state murder trial
items.title_zh: 曼吉奥内的律师在国家谋杀案审判中改变了精神病学辩护的方向
items.desc_en: The defence team reverse course a day after saying they would argue he suffered "extreme emotional disturbance".
items.desc_zh: 辩护团队在表示他们会辩称他遭受了“极度情绪困扰”后一天改变了态度。

items.title_en: The artificial ice pyramids saving India's mountain villages
items.title_zh: 人造冰金字塔拯救了印度的山村
items.desc_en: Himalayan villages are creating artificial glaciers to guarantee water for their crops in the spring.
items.desc_zh: 喜马拉雅山的村庄正在建造人工冰川，以保证春季农作物的用水。
